meta.title: Halia Rose — Vancouver
meta.description: Custom-bridal and special-occasion atelier in Vancouver, BC. Hand-finished pieces, made to measure.

business.name: Halia Rose
business.tagline: Custom bridal and occasion atelier in Vancouver.

data.headline: Made for the day, kept for a lifetime.
data.subhead: Custom bridal and special-occasion pieces, hand-finished in our Yaletown atelier. Two-fitting process, ninety-minute consultation.

text.headline: Three decades of bridal, by the same hands.
text.body: Halia Rose was founded in 1996 by Halia Marlowe. Today the atelier is run with her daughter, Anya. Every piece is hand-cut, hand-finished, and hand-delivered. We work with eight to twelve brides each season.

items.title: Bridal
items.description: Custom gowns from initial sketch through final fitting. Six-month timeline.

items.title: Occasion
items.description: Mother-of, formal galas, milestone celebrations. Three-month timeline.

items.title: Alterations
items.description: Existing pieces, by appointment. Heritage and luxury garments only.

items.author: Catherine V.
items.text: I cried at the first fitting. Halia and Anya understood what I wanted without me being able to articulate it. The dress was the most beautiful thing I have ever owned.

data.headline: Recent collection.
data.description: Our 2025 lookbook — recent commissions and signature silhouettes. By private appointment.
